string 2:
*panting* It looks like I made it here in time. Urk! Ow...
I'm hurt pretty bad.
{next}What happened?
{next}Are you with the Royal Knights?
{next}You're late.

You see, on my way to the rendezvous point, I was forced
to engage the enemy in battle.

Yes, I am. My name is Craniamon, and I'm a member of the
Royal Knights. However...

...on my way to the rendezvous point, I was forced to engage
the enemy in battle.
Am I? Well, according to my calculations...

No, I won't make any excuses. But I wasn't expecting to get
into a fight along the way.

I came here to help save the world, but I never expected to
end up like this...
Do you think I can help the world in such a state?
{next}You should be more confident.
{next}Why not try asking a fortune teller?
{next}I don't like your chances.

I suppose I should take an honest look at myself. What is
your opinion on the matter?

You mean, have my fortune read? I suppose I should take
whatever advice I can get.

You're rather blunt, but you're also right. I wonder if I
can improve those chances?

What? Humans ask fortune tellers about such things? And
there's one in Shinjuku?

Very well. I'll go as soon as I heal up. I wonder what my
fortune will be...
Ah, you're here, too, huh?
{next}Craniamon?
{next}I was curious about your fortune.
{next}What kind of fortune telling are you getting?

Yes, it's me. Actually, I suppose this is the first time
you've seen me in humanoid form.

I'm just about to have my fortune read. I want you to hear
it, too.

I'm just about to find out for myself. You're welcome to
join me.

Oh, it's me, Craniamon. This must be the first time you've
seen me in humanoid form.

I'm curious about palm reading, but can they be accurately
read if I'm in human form?

Oh, it's me, Craniamon. This must be the first time you've
seen me in humanoid form.

Ah, I have been expecting you. Let me see... You wish to
have your friend's fortune read?
And who is this friend...? Ah, yes. I see.

I shall now consult the fates to divine your friend's
fortune. Hmm... Interesting...

I have seen your fortune... Your fate dictates that you pay
a visit to Subroad.
Subroad? That's where I'll find the answers I'm looking for?

Indeed. Once there, you will find a hint as to just how
effective your power can be.

What?! I haven't even told you what I was worried about, so
how did you know...?
{next}Let's go check it out.
{next}How do you tell people's fortunes?
{next}The Father of Shinjuku is pretty impressive.

Yes. For some reason, I feel we can trust this fortune
teller's words.

Sorry, but that is a trade secret. If I told everyone, I
would never get any customers.

I agree. I see why they call him "Father." He has an aura
that deserves respect.

Voice your concerns to the man eating a crepe in Subroad and
your path will be made clear.

A crepe? I'm not sure what that's all about, but we should
go and check it out.

Feel free to come along if you want to see how this turns
out. I'll go ahead on my own.
Ah, it is good to see you. What can I do for you today?
I need a fortune reading.
What was Craniamon's fortune?
{end}Nothing for now, thanks.

Voice your concerns to the man eating a crepe in Subroad and
your path will be made clear.

You've changed your mind? Well, if you ever need a fortune
reading, please come again.

This whipped cream has the perfect sweetness. And is that
salt I'm tasting in the batter?

I'm sorry to interrupt you, but a fortune teller sent me
here...

Ah, the Father of Shinjuku... This must be a Digimon
concern. Tell me. What is your worry?

You're able to see right through me... Well, it's about
losing faith in one's abilities.
I see... So, which one of you has lost their confidence?
{next}This Digi— Er... This human here.
{next}Me.
It's me, actually. I'm somewhat embarrassed to admit it...

Yes, I imagine it's quite embarrassing to say aloud, being a
member of the Royal Knights.

You'll just have to get over it. I'm sure you're more than
capable.
H-How could you possibly know that?! Who are you...?

I've got my sources. I don't know the details, however, so
tell me your concerns.

So you lost your confidence after fighting a Titan? While
not easy, there is a solution...

Fight the strongest Titan. You'll regain your confidence, or
at least know your standing.

I see... Although, which of the Titans is considered the
strongest?
That's easy. It's Plutomon.
{next}Are you sure about this?
{next}Will Plutomon even agree to meet with us?
{next}Can we just show up there?

If you're asking if I'm sure about meeting with Plutomon,
there's no need for concern.

Despite his appearance, Plutomon is quite receptive. Just
try talking to him.

Haha... That's a funny thing to say, considering you've done
it many times before.

Plutomon listens to anyone who is serious in nature, no
matter what their status is.

R-Really? Besides... as a human, how do you even know such
things?
It's like I told you before. I have my sources.

At any rate, head to the Dark Field. Plutomon will join you
there.

I won't ask anything else of you. Thanks for the
information.

Although, I never expected to be visiting the Dark Field...
I must calm my nerves first.

Hm? You want to know who I am? I'm sure you'll figure it out
in due time.

In any case, this perfect blend of salt and fresh cream is
not to be taken lightly.

What's the holdup? Go to the Dark Field and meet with
Plutomon.

Okay, I'm ready. Shall we go to the Dark Field to meet with
Plutomon now?
{next}Let's go.
{end}Hold on.

I'm glad you're with me. Now, let's begin our journey to the
Dark Field.

Yes, I suppose you must prepare, too, considering where
we're going...
So this is the Dark Field...? I wonder where Plutomon is.

That large castle looks likely... If you know the area,
please lead the way.

Ah, it is not often that I have visitors. I have some time
to spare. State your purpose.

You must be Plutomon! My name is Craniamon! I have come to
challenge you to a duel!

I should like to indulge your flight of fancy, but,
regrettably, it is not possible.
Wh-Why do you refuse to fight me?!
{next}Won't you accept the challenge?
{next}Are you worried about involving others?
{next}Let me guess. You can't be bothered?

If I were to fight a Royal Knight, I am afraid everyone
would take it too seriously.

If I fight a Royal Knight, it may turn into a rather serious
battle on both sides.

Heh... Honestly, I would like to fight, but I feel it is not
worth the ensuing trouble.

I can understand that line of reasoning. But how will I be
able to measure my strength?

If you wish to test your readiness and strength, there are
other trials to be faced.

How about Enbarrmon, the immortal steed? That trial may give
you the answers you seek.

An immortal steed... Well, that definitely doesn't sound
like any ordinary challenge.

I imagine it must be fate that has brought us together. I
shall guide you there personally.

Guide me there personally?! I must thank you for your
magnanimity!
So tell me... Did the two of you come here together?

I am in a rather generous mood right now. If you need
anything, go ahead and ask.
{next}I'd like a world without war.
{next}Don't you find conflict to be pointless?
{next}I want the ultimate reward.

Fascinating. You are steeped in war, yet wish for its
demise. I cannot grant that request.

Most of us do not fight to simply show our strength. We have
other reasons for doing so.

You wish for me to answer your question? If that is your
desire, I shall comply.

No, I do not think so... as long as there is a proper reason
for risking one's life.

Ah... I see you are quite greedy. However, I like that you
do not hide your avarice.

Very well. I present you with the greatest reward the Dark
Field has to give: my praise!

Now, then, Craniamon... Let us go forth together and see
what awaits you.

I wasn't able to challenge Plutomon, but it seems I'll have
a chance to test my strength.

I must thank you for accompanying me. Please accept this
token of my gratitude.

I am going with Plutomon now to test my strength. I'll see
you later!
